title: Eastern Chicken Shawarma
description: A flavorful and spicy eastern-style shawarma dish made with tender chicken. Serve with pita bread, salad, and tahini sauce for a delicious meal.

ingredients.name: tender
ingredients.notes: Pounded almonds or cashews for garnish

ingredients.name: middle eastern spice blend
ingredients.notes: Make your own with cumin, coriander, cinnamon, and sumac

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together spice blend, garlic, and olive oil.
Add the chicken to the bowl and mix well to coat.
Grill the chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, toast the pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it on the grill for 2-3 minutes.
Slice the chicken into thin strips.
Serve the chicken in a pita with salad, tahini sauce, and garnish with tender.
